curation_notes: Re-curated with updated guidelines. Locations derived from the patch diff. Vector 1: checkShellArgumentSafety in arguments.go was missing 'password' from the unsafe types map, allowing password-typed arguments to bypass the shell safety check. Vector 2: handleShellBranch in executor.go did not block webhook-tagged requests from shell execution, stepParseArgs did not filter out undefined arguments, and executeAction in webhooks/handler.go passed unfiltered webhook-extracted JSON arguments directly into the execution request. Three non-test source files changed (arguments.go, executor.go, webhooks/handler.go), so the patch is not noisy. Vulnerability class confirmed as command-injection (CWE-78).
